prompt: A warm, cozy anime-style illustration set inside a traditional Japanese mahjong parlor with polished wood walls, shoji-style windows, bookshelves, framed calligraphy, bottles, flowers, and soft amber ceiling lights. In the center foreground, a sad teenage boy with messy dark navy-black hair and tired eyes sits hunched on a chair, wearing a loose dark indigo hoodie and black pants, holding a ranking sheet close to his chest. The sheet prominently reads "11位" at the top, with a vertical list of placements beneath it and the bottom line reading "11位 神代トウマ". He looks embarrassed and defeated, with small sweat drops on his face and 4 vertical blue stress marks above his head. Behind him stands a cheerful young woman with wavy medium-length chestnut-brown hair, a white flower hairpin, and a cream ribbed sweater, smiling warmly and placing one hand on his shoulder. She wears a name tag that reads "雀和ソリ". Her speech bubble says "トウマくん、ドンマイだよ〜！ 次はきっとツイてるよ♡". To the left sits 1 young man with short dark hair in a white shirt, leaning in with one hand near his face, speaking supportively; his speech bubble says "内容は悪くなかったよ。 オーラスの押し引きもよかったし。". To the right sits 1 young woman in a dark blazer over a white shirt, with neat brown hair tied back, gently touching the central boy’s shoulder and speaking calmly; her speech bubble says "結果より内容が大事よ。 焦らず一歩ずつ進んでいきましょう。". Add 1 small muttering bubble near the central boy that says "うっ…". In the upper left, include a hanging wooden sign decorated with cherry blossoms that reads "雀和荘 ようこそ！". In the upper right, place 1 framed scoreboard on the wall titled "本日の麻雀結果" listing 4 ranking lines for 1位, 2位, 3位, 4位 as dotted blanks, and a final line reading "11位 神代トウマ". In the foreground, show 1 green mahjong table with visible rows of mahjong tiles, including a standing tile labeled "中", a small wooden marker labeled "ドラ", and 1 ceramic cup printed with "雀和荘". On the right front corner, add a small snack setup with 3 boxed sweets or candy packages, 1 bowl of snacks, and 1 small potted plant. Use a soft painterly anime aesthetic, detailed fabric folds, expressive eyes, rich warm lighting, gentle emotional contrast between encouragement and disappointment, and a polished visual-novel illustration feel.
